narrative:
Monroe City has 10,349 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.3 percentage points.
